title: Windows download logic flaw: % triggers double extension sanitization bypass (.lnk .lnk, .scf .scf)
bounty_rationale: 1k for the bug (highly mitigated exploitation mitigation bypass), 1k for the patch, 1k for the bisect = 3k
description_snippet:
**Description**

Chrome on Windows can be tricked into delivering **dangerous file types** (for example, **.lnk** or **.scf**) despite the download sanitization that should rewrite them to **.download**.
